channel.title: Error-Tracking on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Error-Tracking on Pi Stack

item.title: GlitchTip vs Exceptionless vs Sentry: Best Self-Hosted Error Tracking 2026
item.description: When your production application throws an unhandled exception, you need to know immediately — not when a customer complains. Self-hosted error tracking gives you full control over your error data, eliminates per-event billing surprises, and keeps sensitive stack traces inside your infrastructure.
